message:
test(fcp-webhook,fcp-cbor): expand webhook and cbor test suites

fcp-webhook: 262 → 357 (+95 tests) across error, event, signature, handler, provider
fcp-cbor: 283 → 368 (+85 tests) covering encoding edges, canonicalization, roundtrips

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
